name: Rarity Viola
projectTitle: I-25 Corridor NOx Emissions Reduction Tool
description: This tool uses a simplified Gaussian dispersion model to estimate pollutant concentrations at receptor locations downwind of the I-25 highway. The Gaussian plume model is widely used in environmental engineering because it provides reasonable estimates for ground-level line-source emissions under steady-state meteorological conditions. It accounts for wind speed, atmospheric stability, and distance to predict how pollutants disperse from the highway.
